title: Federal Funding — Environmental Science Agencies
content:
Environmental-science federal sponsors listed by Morgan State ORA on the Funding Sources page:

- National Oceanic & Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) — https://www.noaa.gov/
- National Renewable Energy Laboratory (NREL) — https://www.nrel.gov/
- U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) — http://www.epa.gov/

These sponsors support research in atmospheric and ocean science, climate, renewable energy, sustainability, environmental health, and pollution mitigation. Morgan PIs in the School of Computer, Mathematical and Natural Sciences and the School of Engineering frequently target these agencies.
